ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead for the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file within the project */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., .java, .py, .html) */,
  "initial_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines in the file when it was initially created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the file */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the file */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is still in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file being revised */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Number of the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date and time the revision was made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the revision */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message describing the changes made */,
  "parent_revision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the previous revision */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch where the revision was made */,
  "merge_commit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the revision is a merge commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the revision where the change was made */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the revision */,
  "lines_removed" INTEGER /* Number of lines removed in the revision */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug introduced or fixed by the change (if applicable) */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., feature, bug fix, refactor) */,
  "impact_score" TEXT /* Quantitative impact score of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_revision_id FOREIGN KEY ("revision_id") REFERENCES revisions ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "bug_description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bug (e.g., open, fixed, closed) */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the bug was reported */,
  "date_fixed" TEXT /* Date the bug was fixed (if applicable) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bug (e.g., critical, major, minor) */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to fix the bug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the company */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the revision the comment is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* Reference to another comment if this is a reply */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_revision_id FOREIGN KEY ("revision_id") REFERENCES revisions ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_reply_to FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "project_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-file association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file */,
  "inclusion_date" TEXT /* Date the file was added to the project */,
  "exclusion_date" TEXT /* Date the file was removed from the project (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)
